parameters.comparison_norm: mass-weighted pairwise Q/FEM boundary disagreement; also best scalar rescale
parameters.fem_apply_big_o: O(n^2) after build in this implementation
parameters.fem_baseline: volumetric P1 radial-fan FEM; boundary Schur-complement DtN; generalized Steklov eigensystem
parameters.q_baseline: final production generated-Q custom FFT with metric repayment
parameters.q_time_big_o: O(n log n) per boundary PDE apply
parameters.truth_policy: This harness does not declare a winner by accuracy. Use analytic manufactured or independently overresolved suites for error claims.
